action_items.title: Regenerate Figures 3, 8, 9 to remove PMP-WD and include all 7 paper methods
action_items.description: Figures 3 (multi_arch_comparison.png), 8 (certified_band.png), and 9 (theorem2_validation.png) all show 'PMP-WD' which is not in the paper. Figures 3 and 9 also omit half_lambda and random_mask. Regenerate with: constant, cosine_schedule, cwd_hard, swd, half_lambda, random_mask, no_wd.

action_items.title: Remove Section 5.7 (Certified Band) and Figure 8 entirely
action_items.description: The Lyapunov stability certificate is never defined, never proven, and empirically contradicted (V_t increases during training). Section 5.7 has no mathematical grounding. Remove the section, remove Figure 8, and renumber subsequent figures.

action_items.title: Fix Figure 3 panel (a) spread annotation and Section 5.2 spread attribution
action_items.description: Figure 3(a) shows 0.49pp spread; Table 2 shows 0.25pp spread; Section 5.2 says 0.92pp spread. The 0.92pp is from SGD (Table 4), misattributed to the AdamW context. After regenerating Figure 3 with correct methods, update the spread annotation to match Table 2 data.

action_items.title: Verify and fix BEM computation for half_lambda (Table 6 vs Figure 4 mismatch)
action_items.description: Table 6 shows half_lambda BEM=0.500 (correct mathematically). Figure 4 plots half_lambda at BEM~0.0. One is wrong. Check the BEM computation code and the source data file, then fix the incorrect artifact.

action_items.title: Resolve or remove Section 5.8 (Cumulative Alignment Analysis)
action_items.description: Section 5.8 uses undefined symbols (delta_t, bar_delta_T, delta_T^sup). The validation result is null (p=0.121, p=0.858). Either: (a) define the symbols in Section 3, state a proposition, present the negative result honestly, OR (b) remove Section 5.8 and Figure 9.

action_items.title: Integrate NoBN experiment data from iter_005
action_items.description: NoBN data exists but is not in the paper. Adding it resolves the AdamW vs BN confound---the paper's central mechanistic ambiguity. Zero compute required.

action_items.title: Add abstract qualifiers for Phi Invariance Conjecture
action_items.description: Abstract omits 'sufficiently overparameterized' and 'with batch normalization' qualifiers from Conjecture 1. Add them.

action_items.title: Specify h(.) function form for SWD in Table 1
action_items.description: Table 1 defines SWD phi as h(||g_t||) but never provides h's concrete functional form. Add the explicit equation from Xie et al. (2023).

action_items.title: Fix figure numbering to match order of first reference
action_items.description: Figure 6 is referenced in Section 5.2 before Figures 3-5. Figure filename numbering (fig3_, fig4_, fig5_, fig6_) does not match paper numbering (Figures 3-9). Renumber all figures sequentially by first reference.

action_items.title: Plan and run minimal ImageNet experiments
action_items.description: 4 methods (constant, cwd_hard, no_wd, cosine_schedule) x 3 seeds x ResNet-50 on ImageNet. Tests conjecture at scale where it is most likely to break. User explicitly requested ImageNet.

action_items.title: Specify best-epoch vs final-epoch accuracy metric in Section 4
action_items.description: Add: 'We report best test accuracy over training as the primary metric.' Source data shows best and final differ by ~0.2%.

action_items.title: Remove 'Figures and Tables' build manifest (lines 432-448)
action_items.description: The index at the paper's end is internal documentation, not standard paper content.

action_items.title: Downgrade Proposition 1 to inline remark
action_items.description: The composition property (product of non-negative functions is non-negative) is trivially obvious and does not merit a labeled proposition.

action_items.title: Explain N=18 derivation in Section 5.8
action_items.description: State which methods and seeds constitute the 18 data points (presumably 6 methods x 3 seeds, excluding no_wd or another method).

action_items.title: Improve Figure 8 resolution if section is kept
action_items.description: certified_band.png is very low resolution with chaotic overlapping lines. If Section 5.7 is retained (not recommended), regenerate at higher resolution with smoothed trajectories.

highest_roi_items: Action 1: Regenerate figures (30 min, fixes 2 critical findings)
Action 2: Remove Section 5.7 (15 min, fixes 1 critical finding)
Action 6: Integrate NoBN data (45 min, resolves central confound)
Action 11: Specify accuracy metric (5 min, fixes reproducibility gap)
